    FROM [MarketingCampaigns] AS [m]
    ORDER BY [m].[StartDate] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [m1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [m0].[Id], [m0].[CourseSessionId], [m0].[MarketingCampaignId], [c].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Capacity], [c].[CourseId], [c].[DayOfWeek], [c].[EndTime], [c].[Fee], [c].[FeeType], [c].[IsActive], [c].[StartTime], [c].[TeacherUserId], [c].[Title], [c].[TotalSessions], [c0].[Id] AS [Id1], [c0].[CreatedAtUtc], [c0].[DeletedAtUtc], [c0].[Description], [c0].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAtUtc]
    FROM [MarketingCampaignCourseSession] AS [m0]
    INNER JOIN [CourseSessions] AS [c] ON [m0].[CourseSessionId] = [c].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [Courses] AS [c0] ON [c].[CourseId] = [c0].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [m1].[Id] = [s].[MarketingCampaignId]
ORDER BY [m1].[StartDate] DESC, [m1].[Id], [s].[Id], [s].[Id0]
